name: Eldritch Invocation: Eldritch Spear
desc: Choose one of your known Warlock cantrips that deals damage and has a range of 10+ feet. When you cast that spell, its range increases by a number of feet equal to 30 times your Warlock level.
**Repeatable.** You can gain this invocation more than once. Each time you do so, choose a different eligible cantrip.

choices.desc: Choose one of your known Warlock cantrips that deals damage and has a range of 10+ feet.
